steps.title: Identify the defining contrast
steps.content:
The passage's strongest clue is the final sentence:
“No matter how thorough Celestine's exhaustion, no matter how little sleep she'd had, there was a nerve of excitement running through each hour.”
The repeated “no matter how” structure emphasizes that despite her difficult working conditions, excitement persists through every moment of her day.

steps.title: Match the emotion to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C states the main purpose correctly: to portray Celestine's excitement about her daughter.

The passage demonstrates this excitement through physical details—her breath catching when she meets her daughter's gaze, dropping her tools to pick her up, anticipating her speech—and culminates in the explicit statement that excitement runs through every hour despite exhaustion.

The other choices either invent details not shown in the text, describe absent people and elements, or misinterpret the passage's focus.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
